Aspect Model zero kilometre failure

urn:samm:io.catenax.zero_km_failure:1.0.0#ZeroKmFailure
This model describes the properties that are necessary to communicate zero kilometer failures of products from the customer to the supplier. Zero km failures are issues with a vehicle component that occur during vehicle assembly.

Overview

Properties

defect

Defect related data
Name
defect
Characteristic
SingleEntity
Type urn:samm:io.catenax.zero_km_failure:1.0.0#DefectEntity
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
defect

part information

Describes and identifies the given part which is suspected to cause the zero kilometre failure.
Name
partInformation
Characteristic
SingleEntity
Type urn:samm:io.catenax.zero_km_failure:1.0.0#PartInformationEntity
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
partInformation

plant information

Information on the plant at which the failure has been discovered (during assembly) for a given part.
Name
plantInformation
Characteristic
SingleEntity
Type urn:samm:io.catenax.zero_km_failure:1.0.0#PlantEntity
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
plantInformation

vehicle

Describes and identifies the vehicle or subassambly in which the part has been assemblied into.
Name
vehicle
Characteristic
SingleEntity
Type urn:samm:io.catenax.zero_km_failure:1.0.0#VehicleEntity
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
vehicle

Entities

Diagnostic Trouble Code

Diagnostic trouble codes or short DTCs are used inside ECUs to monitor failures. They were introduced for measuring vehicle emissions. Major DTCs for emissions are standardized by ISO standard ISO 15031-6:2015 - so called OBD2 standard. Over time DTCs were also introduced in other ECUs also besides engine and emission control. Many DTCs are vehicle manufacturer specific.
Reference
  • https://www.iso.org/standard/66369.html

Properties

Hex

Hex value of this DTC
Name
dtcHexValue
Characteristic
Trait
Reference
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
4337499FF
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
dtcHexValue
Constraints
  • Hex regular expression
    Description
    This regular expression enforces a hex string. It ensures 0-9, a-f, A-F with an optional prefix 0x. Valid examples: 0x0123456789abcdefABCDEF, 0123456789abcdefABCDEF
    Regular expression
    ^(0x)?[0-9a-fA-F]*$|^null$|^NULL$
DTC Full Name

A human-readable name that is the result of the translation of DTC hex code. There is a 1:1 relationship between DTC hex code and DTC full name. DTC full name must include the fault byte added after the minus. DTC full name is unique: That means that at one occurrence timestamp and the same vehicle and the same ECU only one DTC full name can be set.
Name
fullName
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
P0573-00
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
fullName
DTC Description

Description of this DTC. If description name consists of main DTC and failure byte, than both description strings are concatenated using a "-" as separator.
Name
fullDescription
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
Brake Switch "A" Circuit High-no sub type information
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
fullDescription
DTC Fault Path

OEM-specific: Fault path for this DTC. Allows further analysis
Name
faultPath
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
1000761
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
faultPath
DTC Fault Path Description

OEM-specific description of DTC fault path
Name
faultPathDescription
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
shortage to plus
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
faultPathDescription
DTC Freeze Frame

freeze frame from ecu. The freeze frame records many parameters of the DTC and surrounding parameters like outside temperature when the DTC was set. It is a very long HEX string with many OEM-specific and ECU-specific content in
Name
freezeFrame
Characteristic
Trait
Reference
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
100148340349340
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
freezeFrame
Constraints
  • Hex regular expression
    Description
    This regular expression enforces a hex string. It ensures 0-9, a-f, A-F with an optional prefix 0x. Valid examples: 0x0123456789abcdefABCDEF, 0123456789abcdefABCDEF
    Regular expression
    ^(0x)?[0-9a-fA-F]*$|^null$|^NULL$
Is MIL On

Describes whether this DTC sets the MIL (malfunction indicator light) in the dashboard.
Name
isMilOn
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#boolean
Example
true
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
isMilOn
Occurrence Counter

Counter how often this DTC was set in total
Name
occurenceCounterTotal
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#long
Example
10
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
occurenceCounterTotal
DTC First Occurrence Mileage

mileage in km when the DTC occurred the first time
Name
occurenceMileage
Characteristic
Trait
Reference
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#int
Example
15000
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
occurenceMileage
Constraints
  • Mileage Range Constraint
    Description
    Range for a valid mileage counter. -1 marks not available.
    >=
    DefaultScalarValue[value=-1, typeUri='DefaultScalar[urn='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#int']']
    ...
    <= DefaultScalarValue[value=2000000, typeUri='DefaultScalar[urn='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#int']']
Occurrence Mileage Unit

Unit of occurrence mileage - either km or mi.
Name
occurenceMileageUnit
Characteristic
Enumeration
Values
  • km
  • mi
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
km
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
occurenceMileageUnit
DTC First Occurrence

date and time when the DTC occurred the first time/was recorded the first time in the ECU
Name
occurenceTimeStamp
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#dateTime
Example
2022-01-30T14:48:54
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
occurenceTimeStamp
DTC State

OEM-specific state of DTC: 0;1 (permanent/temporary/intermediate), could also be a string with permanent, temporary, intermediate, ....
Name
state
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
permanent
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
state
Type

Indicator whether this DTC was stored as Error or Info

type
Characteristic
Enumeration
Values
  • Error
  • Info

Example
Error
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
type
Environmental Conditions

A list of environment conditions: E.g. outside temperature measured by the vehicle, a specific value measured by on ECU, ....
Name
envConditions
Characteristic
List
Has a certain order
Duplicates allowed
Type urn:samm:io.catenax.fleet.diagnostic_data:3.0.0#EnvironmentCondition
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
envConditions

Environment Condition

One environment condition like temperature, rpm,... If the environment condition was measured on vehicle level -> ecuSerialPartNumber is empty

Properties

Condition Identifier

OEM-specific: Primary key for this condition consists of unique identifier of env. condition and DTC
Name
conditionId
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
DTC1_EnvCond1
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
conditionId
Condition Creation Timestamp

Date and time when this condition/information was created.
Name

Characteristic

Example
2022-01-28T14:48:54
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
conditionCreationTimeStamp

Optional
Yes

Yes

conditionHexValue

    This regular expression enforces a hex string. It ensures 0-9, a-f, A-F with an optional prefix 0x. Valid examples: 0x0123456789abcdefABCDEF, 0123456789abcdefABCDEF
    Regular expression

defect entity

An entity of defect related information relevant for tracebaility of quality issues.

Properties

defect description

Description of the defect as human readable text.
Name
description
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#langString
Example
"Stuck in bootstrap mode."@en
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
description
DTCs

A list of diagnostic trouble codes.
Name
dtcs
Characteristic
List
Has a certain order
Duplicates allowed
Type urn:samm:io.catenax.fleet.diagnostic_data:3.0.0#DiagnosticTroubleCode
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
dtcs
parent items

List of references to related items, e.g. quality tasks. The references are unique within this data space.
Name
parentItems
Characteristic
List
Has a certain order
Duplicates allowed
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
urn:uuid:48878d48-6f1d-47f5-8ded-a441d0d879df
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
parentItems

No
In payload
Yes

part information entity

An entity of part related information relevant for tracebaility of quality issues.

Properties

Data matrix code

String that is encoded in a data matrix code. Data matrix codes or short DMC are labelled/printed on parts. Example: A data matrix code can combine supplier name, part type, manufacturing and many more information. A DMC string is often unique within this data provider.
Name
dataMatrixCode
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
3#5ZZ9454554CE#2024-07-10#BR11
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
dataMatrixCode
name at manufacturer

Name of the part as assigned by the manufacturer
Name
nameAtManufacturer
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
Mirror left
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
nameAtManufacturer
local identifiers

A local identifier enables identification of a part in a specific dataspace, but is not unique in the Catena-X dataspace. Multiple local identifiers may exist.
Name
localIdentifiers
Characteristic
Set
Has no order
Duplicates not allowed
Type urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.industry_core.common:1.0.0#KeyValueList
Optional
Yes
In payload
Yes
Payload key
localIdentifiers
customer part identifier

Part ID as assigned by the customer of the part. The customer Part ID identifies the part (as designed)in the customer`s dataspace. The Part ID does not reference a specific instance of a part and thus should not be confused with the serial number or any other instance IDs. If no specific part ID exists a part family ID may be substituted for it.
Name
customerPartId
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
PRT-12345
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
customerPartId

plant entity

An entity of plant related information relevant for tracebaility of quality issues.

Properties

assembly timestamp

Timestamp of the assembly of the given part.
Name
assemblyTimestamp
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#dateTime
Example
2025-12-19T09:58:28.047+01:00
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
assemblyTimestamp
name of plant assembly line

The name of the assembly line in the plant, where the given part has been assemblied into the vehicle.
Name
assemblyLineName
Characteristic
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
Line 6
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
assemblyLineName
defect parts per shift

Amount of defect parts per shift
Name
defectPartsPerShift
Characteristic
SingleEntity
Type urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.quantity:3.0.0#CountQuantityEntity
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
defectPartsPerShift
plant site identifier

Identifier of the plant site that uniqly identifies the plant within this dataspace.
Name
siteIdentifier
Characteristic
Trait
Reference
  • https://catena-x.net/fileadmin/user_upload/Standard-Bibliothek/Update_PDF_Maerz/5_BPDM/CX_-_0010_BUSINESS_PARTNER_NUMBER_PlatformCapabilityBPDM_v_1.0.1.pdf
Type http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Example
BPNS0123456789ZZ
Optional
No
In payload
Yes
Payload key
siteIdentifier
Constraints
  • BPNS Regular Expression
    Description
    The provided regular expression ensures that the BPNS is composed of prefix 'BPNS', 10 digits and two alphanumeric letters.
    Regular expression
    ^BPNS[a-zA-Z0-9]{12}$
